calendar.matters: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Bassin appeared via zoom for and with William Shoaf (petitioner).
Thomas Malis appeared via zoom (pro per).
Janet Fowler appeared in person (pro per).

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Wilkinson's home, that it now being cited by the city to have the place cleaned up, that the neighbors are complaining, and that there is infestation issue.

All parties agree that they have knowledge of the will drafted by Ms. Wilkinson, that the will was sent to Mr. Malis back in 2010, and that her wishes were to not contact any family members regarding her death.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
